zoomhehe.config.title: ZoomHehe Settings
zoomhehe.config.toggle_mode.desc: When enabled, pressing the zoom key toggles zoom on/off instead of holding.
zoomhehe.config.default_zoom.desc: The FOV multiplier applied when zooming. Lower values = more zoom.
zoomhehe.config.min_zoom.desc: The minimum FOV (most zoomed in) reachable by scrolling.
zoomhehe.config.max_zoom.desc: The maximum FOV (least zoomed in) reachable by scrolling.
zoomhehe.config.animation_speed.desc: How fast the zoom animation plays. Higher = faster.
zoomhehe.config.easing_type.desc: The interpolation curve used for zoom animations.
zoomhehe.config.mouse_sensitivity.desc: Multiplier applied to mouse sensitivity while zoomed. 1.0 = no change.
zoomhehe.config.scroll_sensitivity.desc: How much each scroll tick adjusts the zoom FOV.
zoomhehe.config.cinematic_camera.desc: Enables smooth cinematic camera movement while zoomed.
zoomhehe.config.smooth_camera.desc: Enables vanilla smooth camera while zoomed.
zoomhehe.config.reset_on_release.desc: Resets the zoom level to the default when zoom is released.
zoomhehe.config.spyglass_overlay.desc: Shows the spyglass scope overlay while zoomed.
zoomhehe.config.zoom_sound.desc: Plays a subtle sound when zooming in.
